title: MinChest
description: Makes chest open and close  sounds more clunk and simple.
body:
![minchest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd2e615fc5734b29dbb4f69eb9974cc509d3ccdc.jpeg)
### About

Makes chest open andb close sounds more clunk and simple.

### Updates

The resource pack will be updated to the latest versions of Minecraft.

[![donate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adca3088c3d2dd4353fce413afd87fab80dbbdda.png)](https://nederliver.net/donate.html)
